'''safushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyanisation|kyanisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyanisation|kyanisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| safushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæfishith|sæfishith]] || [[word:sæfishij|sæfishij]] || [[word:sæfishish|sæfishish]] || [[word:sæfishi|sæfishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:safufushuth|safufushuth]] || [[word:safufushuj|safufushuj]] || [[word:safufushush|safufushush]] || [[word:safufushu|safufushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:safushuth|safushuth]] || [[word:safushuj|safushuj]] || [[word:safushush|safushush]] || [[word:safushu|safushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:safufshuth|safufshuth]] || [[word:safufshuj|safufshuj]] || [[word:safufshush|safufshush]] || [[word:safufshuf|safufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:safushuthu|safushuthu]] || [[word:safushuju|safushuju]] || [[word:safushushu|safushushu]] || [[word:safushuku|safushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:safushuth|safushuth]] || [[word:safushuj|safushuj]] || [[word:safushush|safushush]] || [[word:safushu|safushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:safushuthul|safushuthul]] || [[word:safushujul|safushujul]] || [[word:safushushul|safushushul]] || [[word:safushukul|safushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:safushuthuthu|safushuthuthu]] || [[word:safushujuju|safushujuju]] || [[word:safushushushu|safushushushu]] || [[word:safushuku|safushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:safushuthun|safushuthun]] || [[word:safushujun|safushujun]] || [[word:safushushun|safushushun]] || [[word:safushukun|safushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:safushuthuoro|safushuthuoro]] || [[word:safushujuoro|safushujuoro]] || [[word:safushushuoro|safushushuoro]] || [[word:safushukuoro|safushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
